title: What things might help me to become inference engineer?
abstract: I used to work as a full-stack engineer, but it started to burn me out, and I lost interest in building SaaS products. Instead, I began looking for areas that would challenge me, which led me to Infrastructure Engineering. Specifically, I chose the Inference field because I want to remain relevant i
abstract_zh: 我曾是一名全栈工程师，但开始感到倦怠，并对构建SaaS产品失去了兴趣。于是，我开始寻找能挑战我的领域，这让我转向了基础设施工程。具体来说，我选择了推理领域，因为我希望保持相关性。
